title: Pillager’s Gun (Unofficial Port)
description: A Fabric/NeoForge port of Pillager’s Gun, adding firearm combat to pillagers.
body:
**📄 About This Port**

This port updates Pillager’s Gun to work with Minecraft 1.21.1 and above.
This is a community-maintained port and is not officially affiliated with the original developer.

 **The 3.3.3 update now works with Tacz 1.21.1 NeoForge port!**

Link to the official mod: [Pillager's Gun](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pillagers-gun)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🔗 Original Mod**

Pillager’s Gun by Scarasol
👉 View original project: [[Pillager's Gun](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pillagers-gun)]
👉 Author profile: [[Scarasol](https://www.curseforge.com/members/scarasol/projects)]

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**📜 License**

This project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPLv3), inheriting the license from the original mod.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**👤 Credits**

Original Mod Author:

    Scarasol

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**⚠️ Disclaimer**

⚠️ This is an unofficial community port of Pillager’s Gun.

All credit for the original mod design, artwork, models, and code goes to the original author, Scarasol.

This port exists to make the mod available for newer Minecraft versions while we await an official update.

This project is not affiliated with or endorsed by the original author.

**💬 Support**

For issues related to this Unofficial Port, please report them on the GitHub repository linked on this page. [Issues](https://github.com/SmartStreamLabs/Pillager-s-Gun-Unofficial-Port-/issues)
